description: Stage and publish ads to Meta directly from chat, with a persistent OAuth connection that auto-refreshes every 60 days.

customize.description: Secret for the Runneth-test Facebook app. Required for token exchange during OAuth.

post-install.name: Get app URL
post-install.description: Run: app list — note the meta-connect route

post-install.name: Register redirect URI
post-install.description: Add https://{SPAWNETH_HOST}/meta-connect/api/callback to the Runneth-test Meta app at developers.facebook.com → Facebook Login → Settings → Valid OAuth Redirect URIs. Also add {SPAWNETH_HOST} to App Domains.

post-install.name: Connect to Meta
post-install.description: Opens the meta-connect app and walks through the OAuth connection.

post-install.name: Introduce the new capability
post-install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.

changelog.notes: Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.
Initial release. OAuth connection app, 60-day long-lived token, auto-refresh, operating guardrails, publish-only rules.
